<!-- Code generated by cmd/docgen from protocol/lexicons/frame.json; DO NOT EDIT. -->

> *Generated from `protocol/lexicons/frame.json` — edit the source, then run `make book`.*

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | string | yes | ULID stamped by the bus; also the deduplication key. Not supplied by the client. |
| `kind` | string · one of: message, artifact | yes | Frame kind: a message in flight or an artifact at rest. |
| `epoch` | integer | yes | Protocol epoch the bus wrote this frame under. |
| `author` | string | yes | Authenticated client identity, taken by the bus from the request. Not supplied by the client and not forgeable by editing the record. |
| `record` | unknown | yes | Typed lexicon record carried by the frame. The only part the client supplies. |
| `revision` | integer |  | Artifact revision, stamped by the bus; advances on each write. Present only when kind is 'artifact'. |
| `createdAt` | string (datetime) |  | Bus-stamped artifact creation time. Present only when kind is 'artifact'. |
| `updatedAt` | string (datetime) |  | Bus-stamped time of the latest artifact write. Present only when kind is 'artifact'. |
